queries.question: Which magicians performed in Times Square street in New York and which mimes performed on the same street?
queries.sql:
SELECT PERFORMERS.NAME 
FROM PERFORMERS
WHERE (PERFORMERS.GENRE = "Magic" OR PERFORMERS.GENRE = "Mime") AND PERFORMERS.STREET_LOCATION = "Times Square, New York"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?performers a :Performers .
  ?performers p:name ?name .
  ?performers p:GENRE ?genre_w .
  ?performers p:GENRE ?genre_w2 .
  ?performers p:STREET_LOCATION ?street_location_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?genre_w) = "Magic" || STR(?genre_w2) = "Mime")) && STR(?street_location_w) = "Times Square, New York"))
}

queries.question: Display magicians and mimes that performed in Times Square street in New York.
queries.sql:
SELECT PERFORMERS.NAME 
FROM PERFORMERS
WHERE PERFORMERS.GENRE = "Magic" OR PERFORMERS.GENRE = "Mime" AND PERFORMERS.STREET_LOCATION = "Times Square, New York"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?performers a :Performers .
  ?performers p:name ?name .
  ?performers p:GENRE ?genre_w .
  ?performers p:GENRE ?genre_w2 .
  ?performers p:STREET_LOCATION ?street_location_w .
  FILTER((STR(?genre_w) = "Magic" || (STR(?genre_w2) = "Mime" && STR(?street_location_w) = "Times Square, New York")))
}
